name: inkcheck
description: Mechanical QA for ink interactive-fiction stories — compile checks, bounded systematic branch exploration, runtime-error repro paths, and dead-content review. Writes no prose.

flags.description: Report versioned schemas, limits, search modes, and explicit supported/unavailable features without requiring a story.
Return a deterministic bounded source-only project map without compiling or exploring.
Validate project configuration schema v1 and resolve its project-local entrypoint.
Create an idempotent minimal inkcheck.yml without overwriting existing project files.
Scaffold config, pinned CI, artifact ignore rules, and compact version-matched Codex instructions after a no-overwrite preflight.
Emit the full report as a single JSON object on stdout. Use this for programmatic consumption.
Emit a prioritized human-readable fix list grouped by severity, with file/line locations and choice paths where available.
Emit a GitHub Step Summary-friendly Markdown report.
Also fail on warnings, unvisited knots, truncation, or external stubs (exit 1).
Max choices deep to explore, from 1 to 1000. Default 100.

Total exploration state budget across the complementary DFS portfolio, diversity-first beam slice, seeded random-sampling slice, and repro-shortening slice, from 1 to 100000000. Default 10000000. The memory guard (85% of the V8 heap by default) stops cleanly before OOM, so the practical limiter on a big run is memory, not this ceiling; small stories early-exit on exhaustive coverage.
Seed for the reproducible random-sampling slice, from 1 to 4294967295. Default 1; the same seed always samples the same walks.
Select portfolio (default), shared, or shared-variable. Variable-aware mode dedicates 12.5% of shared-frontier selections to uncommon observed variable states and transitions.

Stop exploration cleanly before heap use exceeds <mb> and return a partial report (truncatedBy.memory), instead of crashing on an uncatchable V8 out-of-memory. Default: 85% of the V8 heap limit (honors --max-old-space-size).

Stop exploration cleanly after <s> seconds and return a partial report (truncatedBy.time), instead of running to the state budget. Default: no time limit. Useful for CI or hosted runs that need a bounded wall clock but still want the findings so far.

Print a static story-shape profile (variables, choice density, longest divert path) plus the depth limit and pass weights inkcheck would choose, without exploring. Combine with --json for machine-readable output.
Apply the shape profile: raise --max-depth when static divert paths outrun the default (explicit flags always win; limits are never lowered) and use the profile's pass weights for the portfolio.

After the check, apply the report's nextRun recommendation and rerun automatically — up to 3 escalations, stopping on a stop/investigate verdict, at the flag ceilings, or when an escalated run finds nothing new. The per-run trail appears in --json output as `runs`; hop narration goes to stderr.
Skip the small BFS repro-shortening slice and spend that budget on the DFS portfolio instead.

exitCodes.0: Clean — compiled and explored with no errors (and, under --strict, no warnings, unvisited knots, truncation, or external stubs).
exitCodes.1: Failure — compile errors, runtime errors, or (under --strict) warnings, unvisited knots, truncation, or external stubs.
exitCodes.2: Usage error — no story file given or bad arguments.

jsonSchema.reportEnvelope: { schemaVersion: 1, inkcheckVersion, storyFingerprint: {algorithm, source, value}, effectiveConfiguration, bindingLimit, compile, stats?, profile?, explore?, nextRun?, runs? }
jsonSchema.capabilities: { schemaVersion, inkcheckVersion, schemas: {report, config, projectInspection}, limits, searchModes, features: {projectInspection, indexedWitnesses, assertions, goals, resumableSearch} }
jsonSchema.inspection: { schemaVersion, inkcheckVersion, entrypoint, includes, shape, semantics, externals, knots, variables, truncation, recommendedNextOperation }
jsonSchema.compile: { success: bool, issues: [{severity, file, line, message}], errors: int, warnings: int, todos: int }
jsonSchema.stats: { words, knots, stitches, functions, choices, gathers, diverts }
jsonSchema.explore: { statesExplored: int, endingsFound: [{id, kind, path, choiceIndices, firstDiscoveredAtState, replay, witness, finalText, variables, foundBy?}], runtimeErrors: [{id, kind, message, path, choiceIndices, firstDiscoveredAtState, replay, witness, sourceLocation?, foundBy?}], assertionResults: [{id, description?, when, status: 'violated'|'not_observed'|'exhaustively_verified', observations, violations: [{id, kind: 'assertion.violation', observedValues, path, choiceIndices, replay, witness, sourceLocation?, foundBy}]}], unvisitedKnots: [{name, file, line, inboundDiverts?, staticOrphanCandidate?}], externalFunctionsStubbed: string[], randomnessDetected: bool, truncated: bool, truncatedBy: {maxDepth: bool, maxStates: bool, beamWidth: bool, memory: bool, time: bool}, exhaustive: bool, limits: {maxDepth, maxStates, seed?}, schedule?: [{round: int, entries: [{pass, granted, consumed, newEndings, newKnots, newRuntimeErrors}]}], passes?: [{pass, systematic, statesExplored, granted, endingsFound, runtimeErrorsFound, knotsVisited, newEndings, newKnots, newRuntimeErrors, dedupeHits, maxDepthReached, lastDiscoveryAtState, truncatedBy, exhaustive, peakFrontier?, prunes?, uniqueStates?, peakPendingStates?, peakPendingBytes?, variableStatesObserved?, variableTransitionsObserved?, rareVariableTransitions?}] }
jsonSchema.profile: (with --auto or --profile --json) { knots, functions, variables, varAssignments, earlyAssignmentShare, choiceLines, hasCycles, longestKnotPath, choiceDepthEstimate, suggested: {maxDepth, weights: {last, first, insideOut, beam, random}, rationale: string[]} }
jsonSchema.nextRun: { recommendation: 'stop'|'deepen'|'broaden'|'reseed'|'investigate', stop: bool, flags: {maxDepth, maxStates, seed?}, rationale: string, expectedGain: string } — deterministic function of the report; loop on it: rerun with flags until stop is true
jsonSchema.runs: (with --next) [{run: int, flags, statesExplored, endings, runtimeErrors, visitedKnots, recommendation}]

tools.name: inkcheck_capabilities
tools.description: Versioned schemas, limits, search modes, and explicit feature availability.

tools.name: inspect_story
tools.description: Bounded source-only project map; does not compile or explore.

tools.name: story_stats
tools.description: Word/knot/choice counts plus the full knot list with locations.

tools.name: playtest_story
tools.description: Play one scripted choice path headlessly; returns transcript, tags, variables, errors.

tools.name: explore_story
tools.description: Bounded systematic walk: terminal states, error repro paths, knot coverage, and explicit coverage limits.

agentLoop: edit .ink → compile_story → explore_story → fix confirmed failures → review coverage limitations → repeat. Never infer that a truncated, randomized, or externally driven story was completely verified.
